seams_observed.desc: round-handler-tick: wire the live RoundHandler to tick per-gametype callbacks (CanRoundStart/End, CheckWinner, warmup/countdown, round timelimit/stalemate). Many gametypes call EnableRounds() with no callbacks so the handler uses degenerate CA defaults; several also build a SECOND Common RoundHandler whose Tick is never called.

notification-send: send registered-but-never-fired INFO/CENTER/ANNCE notifications at their event sites (round-win/tied/over, capture, role, frags-remaining, finish/record, alone, supermonster). Pervasive across every gametype — the single most common gap.

sound-cue-dispatch: add live callers for registered-but-silent SoundSystem cues (KH alarm siren / capture jingle / collect / drop, DOM_CLAIM, nexball bounce/drop/shoot/steal, ONS build/under-attack/explode, KA pickup/drop/touch).

mod-icons-hud: gametype status block -> mod-icon HUD feed + client mode-select. Server send Kind + client ModIconsMode case both missing for CTF flag status, Domination pps, Keepaway/TeamKeepaway carrying, Nexball carrying, LMS leader.

input-impulse-routing: route currently-unbound player input/impulses — CTF flag throw/pass/request-pass, KeyHunt voluntary +use key drop, Keepaway/TeamKeepaway/Nexball ball drop/pass. The handlers are ported and unit-tested but have no input binding.

ball-entity-framework: shared ball spawn/think/touch/carry lifecycle. Keepaway and TeamKeepaway SpawnBall has zero callers (no procedural host-side ball driver replacing ka_Handler_CheckBall), so neither mode is playable; Nexball has its own related lifecycle-think gap.

objective-entity-csqc: networked objective world models + icons + progressive damage-model swaps + death-cam. Onslaught generators/control-points and Assault objective sprites/health-bars are unrendered on the client.
fx-emission-wiring: live callers/parameters for registered-but-unemitted effects (KeyHunt capture VFX te_lightning2/plasma chain, Onslaught EFFECT_CAP/RAGE/SPARKS/explosion).
csqcmodel-anim-fx: player-model effect-flag/forced-color/glow pipeline the client consumes. FreezeTag frozen tint/ice + the dead crosshair thaw-ring final hop; LMS leader glow.

projectile-net-model: networked flying-projectile entity with model+trail (NetEntityKind.Projectile defined but assigned nowhere). CTF flag toss velocity + dropped-flag tumble depends on a thrown-object visual; only marginally needed for gametypes.

The MutatorHooks.SetWeaponArena chain has NO .Call site anywhere in the port — every arena mode (Mayhem, TeamMayhem, ClanArena, LMS, plus Instagib/Melee/Overkill mutators) ships players the Blaster only instead of the full/most arsenal. One shared engine-seam fix unblocks all of them.

Only arena mutators subscribe the SetStartItems hook; CA and LMS (and Invasion's ROUND 200/200) need the gametype to subscribe / call ApplyStartItems on the live spawn path so their fixed loadouts apply.

MatchController.AddPlayer/RemovePlayer only mutate their own roster and never forward join/disconnect to the active gametype, so per-join/per-leave gametype hooks (LMS lives gate + forfeit rank reshuffle + scoreboard seed) are dead.

MonsterAI.FindTarget acquires any client unconditionally (no g_monster_targets / monster_attack=false gate), so Invasion (and other monster-co-op modes) monsters chase/attack players when Base says they should ignore them.

The Race/CTS timer + splits + medal + PB/server-best HUD panels and rankings column are fully built but have no TE_CSQC_RACE-equivalent net feed; the Race* stat properties are never assigned. A shared race-status net channel unblocks both Race and CTS presentation.

Race/CTS run timing uses wall-clock Api.Clock.Time instead of the QC per-frame .race_movetime accumulator, so recorded times drift under frame-rate jitter/pause. Shared deterministic run-clock + force-keyboard movement quantization.
DamageSystem never consults the gametype's possession damage/force scale (Keepaway/TeamKeepaway DamageScale/DamageForceScale have zero callers). A shared per-hit gametype damage-matrix consult hook.
No join free-slot/player-limit gate in ClientManager.JoinAllowed and BotPopulation reads g_maxplayers, so Duel's GetPlayerLimit->2 is never enforced on either the human-join or bot-fill path.

DamageSystem.EventDamage must invoke Entity.ProjectileDamage for non-player damageable projectiles (currently only BreakablehookMutator calls it; non-players route GtEventDamage else PlayerDamage). Enables shoot-down for every flying projectile.

The int weapon-id firing/damage API (WeaponFiring.ApplyDamage / WeaponSplash.RadiusDamage -> FromWeapon(NetName)) cannot carry HITTYPE_SECONDARY/SOUND/BOUNCE bits; needs a channel so secondary/sound/bounce kill-message and friendly-fire rules work.
Live callers for registered-but-silent SoundSystem cues: bullet-impact ricochet (PlayRic/Ric), plus per-weapon detonation/impact sounds (electro impacts, seeker/flac seekerexp).
Emit registered-but-unemitted EffectsList effects: bullet tracers, shell casings, bounce particles, melee woosh, guide/overheat/smoke/joinexplode/bfg per-victim effects, muzzleflashes.
Networked flying-projectile entities with model + trail: NetEntityKind.Projectile is defined but assigned nowhere, so grenade/orb/mine/bolt are invisible in flight.
Send registered-but-never-fired announce/notifications at their event sites: yoda/impressive/airshot/electrobitch achievements, headshot, minelayer-limit centerprint.
Route currently-unbound offhand-fire input/impulses to the server (InputButtons has no hook bit; OffhandFirePressed never assigned), enabling offhand hook and offhand blaster.
Per-weapon bot wr_aim hooks (projectile lead, primary/secondary distance switching, detonation decisions) — deferred for all weapons in BotBrain; needed for bot weapon competence.
Custom client beam/rope/cylindric-line renderers fed by networked endpoint state: vaporizer rail beam, hook rope line, arc bezier beam (arc currently mis-classified as a spark trail).
Network the server-only weapon charge value (vortex_charge / oknex charge) to clients as a stat so the crosshair charge ring, charge-scaled beam, and player-model glow can read it.
MoveTypePhysics Bounce case hardcodes bouncefactor 0.5 / bouncestop 60/800 and never reads ent.BounceFactor/BounceStop, so per-projectile bounce overrides (electro orb 0.3/0.05) are dead.

seams_observed.desc: active-mutators-mech: BuildMutatorsString/PrettyString + MUT_* active-mutator HUD/scoreboard/server-browser advertisement. The single most pervasive shared gap — the whole mechanism is unported and nearly every mutator has a dead per-mutator string handler or none at all.

input-impulse-routing: the dead offhand/+hook/weapon_drop input wire. InputCommand.InputButtons has no hook/offhand bit and Entity.OffhandFirePressed is never assigned; Entity.MovementForward/MovementRight are never written either. One input-bridge fix revives several entire subsystems.

notification-send: registered-but-never-fired INFO/CENTER/ANNCE notifications at their event sites (powerup pickup/powerdown, kick-teamkiller severity messages, instagib announcer ladder, nade/buff pickup-loss).

entity-alpha-net: default_player_alpha worldspawn seed + SetDefaultAlpha world-init driver firing the dead hook chain + per-entity Alpha network field + transparent player render. Entirely absent infrastructure.
mod-icons-hud / gametype status -> client feed: needed for waypoint objective markers and the itemstime spectator feed reaching remote clients.
round-handler-tick / global round-state accessor: no RoundHandler is reachable from the Common gameplay layer, blocking round-active/round-started pre-start gates.
projectile-net-model: networked flying-projectile entity (model + trail) — needed for RM laser bolts and (via the shoot-down dispatch) invincibleproj observability and nade projectile render.

Shared entity-level FilterItem (replace/block a map item by classname at spawn) + ItemTouch (re-randomize/full-heal/re-spawn on pickup) mutator-hook chains. The port only has the definition-level FilterItemDefinition; the entity FilterItem and the entire ItemTouch chain do not exist, blocking random_items map replacement, overkill/instagib item conversion+replacement, buffs powerup-replace, instagib cells/extralife touch, and superspec/powerups item-touch behaviors.

Multiple defined-but-never-Called hook chains (SetWeaponArena, ForbidRandomStartWeapons, SetDefaultAlpha) plus entirely-missing chains (MonsterDropItem, MakePlayerObserver, ClientDisconnect, reset_map_global, PutClientInServer, SpectateCopy, AddedPlayerScore post-write, VehicleEnter, DropSpecialItems, ClientConnect, CopyBody, Item_RespawnCountdown/ScheduleRespawn, Item_Spawn, MonsterMove, SV_ParseClientCommand). Cross-cutting lifecycle/cleanup infrastructure.

seams_observed.desc: The single biggest cross-cutting defect: TurretAI.Damage and VehicleCommon.DamageVehicle (and vehicles_heal) are faithfully written but have NO live caller. DamageSystem.EventDamage routes non-player targets through targ.GtEventDamage, but no turret or vehicle ever assigns it, so all turret/vehicle hits fall through to PlayerDamage (player ARMOR/HEALTH split, no per-unit damagerate, no inactive-immunity, no friendly-fire gate, no headshake/retaliate, no shield-then-health split, no death-eject/respawn). Wire the event_damage/event_heal handler at spawn/enter for every turret and vehicle.

Per-unit balance is hardcoded C# const instead of cvar-loaded (load_unit_settings / TR_PROPS_COMMON / g_turrets_unit_<name>_* / turret_scale_* / g_turrets_reloadcvars). Baked values mostly match cfg but several drift (biases default to 1.0, track accel/blend defaults, respawntimes, shot_spread, range_optimal), server overrides + map scale multipliers are inert, and value drift goes uncaught. A shared cvar-backed param table fixes the whole bias/track/respawn/spread/range class across all turrets.

No turret networking (TNSF_* send/parse, ENT_CLIENT_TURRET) and no cl_turrets.qc client presentation: head sub-entity/model + rotation/spin, team recolor, low-HP sparks/smoke, death rocket-explode + gib toss, waypoint sprite/healthbar, per-unit head-frame animations, the tesla idle crackle arc, walker ground-align, ewheel rolling draw.

turret_checkpoint / walker_checkpoint chains + turret_targettrigger (RECIEVETARGETS) + turrets_manager — the waypoint path graph mobile turrets follow when idle and the externally-fed target reception. Mobile turrets (walker/ewheel) brake in place instead of patrolling their path chain.

Base's AIMDIST firecheck rides a tracebox in turret_do_updates (tur_dist_impact_to_aimpos) so a wall between muzzle and aimpos blocks the shot (de-facto fire-time LOS), plus the TFL_FIRECHECK_AFF friendly-fire-avoid impact-entity trace. The port's OnTarget is a pure geometric barrel-line check, so it fires through walls and through teammates.
Cross-turret designated-target feed (turret_hk_addtarget / TUR_FLAG_RECIEVETARGETS) so a relay/other turret can hand an HK a target it didn't self-acquire.

The .sounds-file GlobalSound table + g_monsters_sounds gate + msound_delay throttle + the idle(7s)/melee/spawn/ranged/body-impact cues. The port hardcodes 3 fixed-path cues (sight/pain/death) and is wrong per-monster (zombie pain/melee should be silent, golem/mage play fabricated cues), with no throttle so pain/death can spam.

CSQC monster mr_anim frame-group playback: the server keeps a logical MonsterAnim phase (Idle/Walk/Run/Attack/Pain/Death) but Entity.Frame is never written for any monster (always networks 0), so no monster ever visibly walks/attacks/blocks/pains/dies. Shared across all five monsters.
WP_Monster healthbar waypoint sprite (g_monsters_healthbars) + WaypointSprite_UpdateHealth on each hit + _Kill on death. Entirely unported.

Round-restart reset: GameWorld.ResetMapObjects only deletes projectiles; it never iterates entities calling Entity.Reset, so MonsterAI.Reset/ResetAll (and any other .reset delegate) are dead — monsters aren't restored/removed on a round restart.
DropItem spawns a generic loot marker carrying the list name instead of instantiating the real item entities (health_mega/electro/etc.) via Item_RandomFromList. Killed monsters drop nothing usable.

PlayerPhysics_UpdateStats must read STATUSEFFECT_Webbed to halve MOVEVARS_HIGHSPEED — the spider's signature crowd-control has zero effect on players (only monster-vs-monster slow is ported). The integration point (Speed powerup / entrap nade x0.5) already exists.
MoveToRandomLocationWithinBounds (sample a clear point within a +/-box) for the mage's 40% teleport random-relocation branch.

The +use rising-edge -> VehicleBoarding.UseKey dispatch. NOTE: racer/raptor/spiderbot shards report this IS now wired live via ServerNet +use, but the bumblebee shard + framework report UseKey has no live caller — the bumblebee (pilot + both gunners) is entirely unreachable. Verify/extend the dispatch to cover the multi-seat bumblebee path.

TE_CSQC_VEHICLESETUP / VEHICLESTAT_* / SVC_SETVIEWPORT: the in-vehicle cockpit/chase camera + the registered-but-unfed VehicleHud + aux lock/gunner crosshairs + the 0..100% ammo/energy/shield owner-mirror. A pilot has no vehicle HUD and no cockpit view.

PlayerPhysics dual-dispatch of .Touch onto solid vehicles, enabling vehicles_touch crush (run over players/monsters, DEATH_VH_CRUSH), vehicles_impact fall/ram self-damage (DEATH_FALL bouncepain per vehicle), and the touch-board path. None are reachable today.

vr_enter must reposition a boarding flag-carrier's carried CTF flag to the cockpit/head mount (spiderbot tur_head '-20 0 120'; racer '-190 0 96'; raptor '-20 0 96'). Directly tied to the CTF flag-rotation validation anchor.

The per-frame vehicle controllers (spiderbot at least) are invoked once per 0.1s DefaultThinkRate but their turn/gravity steps multiply by Api.Clock.FrameTime (TicRate ~0.0167s) instead of elapsed time — a ~6x magnitude error (turning far too slow), not merely coarse. Either run the controller every movement frame or scale by the real elapsed dt.

The bumblebee's signature networked BRG_* heal/damage beam (ENT_CLIENT_BUMBLE_RAYGUN, bumble_raygun_send/NET_HANDLE + multi-segment Draw_CylindricLine cylinder). Only a placeholder EffectEmitter.TeHealBeam/TeBeam stub exists.

Per-entity event_damage hook for shootable map-objects (single-hit + NOSPLASH + health==-1 semantics) instead of the accumulate-only Combat.Death hook.
Promote the `sounds` map key (and legacy sound1/sound2) in ApplyDictFields/MapObjectFieldsExtra so door/plat/secret sound-pack selection works.
Client-side centerprint for func_*/trigger .message and the CENTER_DOOR_*/CENTER_SEQUENCE_* notifications (text dropped, server plays only the audible half).
Parse the `platmovetype` spawn key into PlatMoveStart/End via set_platmovetype + cubic_speedfunc_is_sane reject; tied to fixing the default-easing 1/1-vs-0/0 divergence.
Godot SubViewport+Camera3D rendering the linked OUT plane onto the warpzone/camera surface, replacing the static dark HeroMaterials placeholder (+ PVS distance fade).
Register g_telefrags / g_telefrags_teamplay / g_telefrags_avoid in Cvars.cs (currently inert; teamplay sense is inverted relative to the Base name).

Full Porto portal model edict (Portal_Spawn/Damage/Remove): model+skins+EF glow, 200 health, 15s lifetime/fade/recharge, explode/expire sounds, Portal_Customize gating, predict-ahead crossing, hook teleport, pair cleanup — replacing the permanent-warpzone realisation.
Assign the test-only host seams (NextLevelHandler/ChangeLevelHandler/RealPlayerVoteCount/CampaignLevelWarpHandler/IsCampaign/SpawnEntityHandler) on the live boot path.
TE_CSQC_TARGET_MUSIC / ENT_CLIENT_TRIGGER_MUSIC net path so remote/dedicated clients receive music overrides + per-activator scoping + per-round reset/kill/restore.
A live q3compat flag in the mapobject layer (CompatRemaps.cs:17 documents none exists) gating Q3/Q3DF plat defaults, plat_target_use fork, and Q3-only spawn paths.
Add Entity.BounceFactor/BounceStop fields + consume the producer params (already passed by MonsterAI/Spider/Golem/weapon projectiles but dropped) so bounce restitution/settle match Base.
PlayerPhysics/MovementParameters must read SwampSlug.SwampSlowdown as a maxspd_mod — the slowdown is stamped each frame but no movement code consumes it (swamp is the dead half of trigger_swamp).
Entity.damagedbytriggers flag gating non-creature victims of trigger_hurt/target_kill.
Bind the chmap/gametype BSP entity keys to ChMap/ChLevelGameType (declared but no field binder reads them, so target_changelevel can never reach its map-switch branch).
DP-style realtime light render driver from light_lev/color/style so dynlight entities emit visible light.
A server say/chat pipeline that calls MagicEarProcessAllEars (the magicear string-match core is faithful but has no live caller).
Client 2.5D side-scroller camera that locks the view to the start→end line, consuming the server-stamped player.ViewLoc.
soundto MSG_ONE so target_speaker ACTIVATOR plays only to the triggering real client (+ *-prefixed per-player voice-sample randomization).
Toggle EF_TELEPORT_BIT on the player model + carry to the client for the dissolve/restart-anim flash on teleport.
Client view rotate across the seam + near-clip push-out + roll-kill + exterior-model hide when the camera straddles a warpzone (WarpZone_FixView/FixNearClip/View_Inside/FixPMove).
Server sends warpzone_teleported + re-rotates v_angle; client rotates view/input (CL_RotateMoves) on a server crossing.
Extend TriggerTouch.PredictTeleportsAmbient to predict trigger_warpzone crossings (currently trigger_teleport only) so a crossing is seamless not a rubber-band.
Expose per-contact Q3SURFACEFLAG_SLICK/noimpact + the true wall normal to projectile OnTouch in the headless sim (for Porto portal orientation/reflection).
A RemoveGrapplingHooks(player) entry point callable from the teleport path (currently a private per-slot RemoveHook in Hook.cs with no caller there).
Drive ANIMACTION_JUMP launch pose (shared between jumppads and PlayerJump).
Host stamps GameStartTime with the real match-countdown end so trigger_gamestart wait>0 fires relative to it, not t=0.
doBGMScript/BGMScript_InitEntity + .bgs loader animating clientwall/pointparticles alpha/position/emission to the map music.
Ent_Wall_PreDraw distance-fade alpha formula + PVS alpha-cull renderer consuming the stored FadeStart/End/AlphaMin/Max (+ the antiwall solid/visible toggle relay).
Team-tint a prop on screen from Entity.ColorMapOverride.
Golden-trace coverage for g_physics_clientselect non-default presets (CPMA/Warsow/xdf) — only the stock Xonotic preset is byte-verified.
Movetype_Physics_MatchTicrate sub-tick interpolation (tic_* snapshot fields + whole-frame stepping + residual-dt trace + sloppy interp) for client-side moveables.
$-field reflection templating engine (numentityfields/putentityfieldstring/field DB + activator/other/pusher/target substitutions + helper spawnfuncs + create-cap).
Round-handler tick — needed for the telefrag round-countdown suppression gate (!round_handler_IsRoundStarted).
Projectile/model net — a Porto portal model edict is a networked model entity in the S1 class.
Notification-send — the ANNCE_ACHIEVEMENT_AMAZING portal-telefrag announcer is registered but never fired.

Feed the dead MapVotePanel (SetVote/SetVotes/Active have no callers) from a mapvote decode path + wire client input to cast.
Broadcast the queued next map to clients so ScoreboardPanel.NextMap ('Next map: …') stops being blank.
Add SVC_INTERMISSION client view freeze: lock to an intermission camera, hide viewmodel (EF_NODRAW), set -2342 health sentinel (MatchIntermission already networked).
Auto-show the scoreboard at intermission==1 (and hide at ==2 for the mapvote) instead of only while +showscores is held.

seams_needed: new:server-welcome-channel (server->client stuffcmd channel to trigger client autoscreenshot)
units.headline: Add server-forced end-of-match autoscreenshot stuffcmd (sv_autoscreenshot + cl_autoscreenshot_screenshot).
Stop map music at match end (target_music_kill) + sv_intermission_cdtrack random intermission-track switch.
Replace closed-form ballistic-drop approximation with the QC 10-trace tracetoss search + per-weaponentity shot speed (W_WeaponSpeedFactor) for lobbed-weapon aim.
Add sticky-enemy tracking window, see-through-transparent + misc_breakablemodel target passes, and SUPERBOT health/distance target rating.
Port the QC far/mid/close ordered weapon-priority lists + bot_ai_weapon_combo + bot_rangepreference instead of the coarse hitscan/splash highest-impulse bucket.
Add idle-reload behaviour (skill>=2 held-weapon reload, skill>=5 inventory pre-reload) so bots don't run dry mid-combat.

seams_needed: new:bot-wr_aim-driver (per-weapon wr_aim fire driver invoking secondary/charge/detonate/combo per weapon slot)
units.headline: Drive per-weapon wr_aim each think (secondary fire, charge-up/release, projectile detonation, combos) — currently only primary attack fires, ButtonAttack2 hardcoded false.
Rate goals by waypoint-cost (Dijkstra path length) not straight-line distance, restore per-call rangebias + skill-scaled time-item lead + moving-target interval.
Port havocbot_dodge (sidestep specific incoming projectiles by flight path) + SUPERBOT combat jitter instead of the invented strafe-flip + HP-bias.
Add jetpack navigation (take off / fly / brake-land) + skill>6 trigger_hurt escape (jetpack up / Devastator rocketjump).
Derive step/jump heights from sv_stepheight/sv_jumpvelocity/sv_gravity (not hardcoded 34/48) + fuller teleport/ladder/water waypoint traversal.
Replace brake-only danger response with the QC lateral evadedanger sidestep vector + per-waypoint danger-cost accumulation.
Add keyboard-movement emulation (quantized wish-move below skill 10) for the stock low-skill bot feel.
Port the bot scripting command queue (bot_cmd / scripting.qc) so map/console bot scripts and waypoint-editor bot driving work.
Add autoskill/skill_auto auto-tune-to-best-human (the per-bot 12-column model is an intended single-knob divergence).
Add the bot_aggresskill modifier to the long-range fire-hesitation chance (port uses skill only, loses per-bot aggression variance).
Parse the skin/shirt/pants + team-forcing columns of bots.txt (currently name+model only).
Fix link travel-cost: skill-dependent bunnyhop speedup, the unused JUMP-source fall-cost variant, and the half-path water/crouch averaging.

seams_needed: new:waypoint-danger-bias (botframe_updatedangerousobjects per-waypoint .dmg accumulation feeding route cost)
units.headline: Add per-waypoint danger bias (.dmg) to the A* route cost + expanding multi-seed nearest search so routes detour around lava/rocket zones.
Add PVS cull before tracewalk, the crouch<->normal 100qu short-link cap, and per-direction box/JUMP/SUPPORT link forbidding (auto-relink only path).
Inject runtime item/teleporter waypoints on shipped (.waypoints-bearing) maps + honor g_waypoints_for_items + tracedown floor-snap.
Add warpzone-angle src/dest projection + oblique-warpzone JUMP flag + jumppad push-time cost for auto teleporter waypoints.
Add .waypoints/.cache/.hardwired file writers (dev tooling; port is read-only).
Port steerlib primitives (flock/swarm/traceavoid trident-funnel/beamsteer) for richer obstacle avoidance.
Add the in-game waypoint editor (place/remove/hardwire/mirror + visualization) and runtime auto-waypointing/pruning (dev tooling).
Add teleport-goal forcing + moving-target shortcut (strategyinterval_movingtarget 5.5) to route building.
Add per-bot bot_moveskill to the bunnyhop skill gate and suppress bunnyhop when evadedanger/do_break is set this frame.
Add jumppad-fallback + walk-to vs walk-from direction distinction to nearest-waypoint query.
Enforce the 32-link-per-waypoint sorted cap on the file-load link path (currently uncapped/unsorted).
Fix g_warmup_limit default (-1 -> 180 per xonotic-server.cfg) and add g_warmup>1 min-N-players + map_minplayers warmup modes.

Fix ready-up majority to count humans only (rint, min factor 0.5), add minplayers/badteams/timeout gates + COUNTDOWN_STOP notifications (warmup may never end on a bot-filled server).
Fix RESTART_COUNTDOWN (5->10s, campaign 3s), implement sv_ready_restart_after_countdown (default invert 1->0), add team-lock/spectate-demote/wants_join/allowed_timeouts reset.
Drive the full entity .reset/.reset2 ordered pass (movers/items/team_saved) + per-client accuracy/powerup/inventory reset on restart (currently projectile-only delete).
Add WinningCondition_RanOutOfSpawns, leadlimit/leadlimit_and_fraglimit semantics, the 'N frags remaining' ANNCE_REMAINING_FRAG announcer, and the CheckRules_World mutator hook.

units.headline: Network STAT(OVERTIMES) so the persistent HUD OVERTIME / overtime-count banner shows (decision logic already faithful).

units.headline: Add the RandomSeed shared server->client RNG broadcast (ENT_CLIENT_RANDOMSEED) so client-side random effects stay deterministic with the server.

units.headline: Add PingPLReport: round-robin server->client ping/packet-loss report feeding the scoreboard ping column and playerstats latency.
Install the 12 named animated lightstyles (flicker/pulse/candle/strobe) + style 63 at worldspawn so style-driven map lights animate.
Add g_start_delay pre-match join window (15s on dedicated) so the match doesn't start immediately with warmup off.
Recompute max_shot_distance per-map from world bounds (min(230000, world diagonal)) instead of the fixed 32768qu constant.

Make GameWorld.Shutdown do the QC teardown: slowmo-reset-on-active-timeout, unfinished-match PlayerStats_GameReport(false), bot_endgame (currently near no-op).
Use the QC matchid format (<counter>.<unixtime>.<rand6>) for eventlog correlation instead of just the map name.
Enforce playban on the live join path: CmdJoin/ClientManager join must reject a play-banned client with CENTER_JOIN_PLAYBAN (currently deferred — a banned player just re-joins).

seams_needed: new:put-observer-transition (real PutObserverInServer demotion reused by playban; shared with sv-client-lifecycle observer)
units.headline: Make CmdPlayBan run the real observer transition (not just the FragsStatus sentinel), add connect-time re-apply + minigame active-removal, and fix g_playban_minigames default (1->0).
Re-apply chat-mute at connect (read g_chatban_list in InfraClientConnect) so a muted player who reconnects stays muted.
Add the one-shot .ban_checked flag + first-command ban re-check (Base Ban_MaybeEnforceBanOnce) on top of the connect-time enforce.
Add a shutdown Ban_SaveBans to refresh persisted seconds-remaining at session end (currently saved only on Insert/Delete).
Add the timeout_status guard (only 'timein' callable during a timeout) + sv_vote_gamestart pre-match gate to vote-call.
Fix vote parse: register timelimit_min/max (5/60) bound, run ValidateMap/MapInfo_FixName/recent-map block, per-command arg restriction, movetoX/allready-warmup parse, QC kick/kickban index form.
Wire VoteController.IsPlayer in GameWorld so sv_vote_nospectators 2 drops spectator ballots (currently defaults to true => spectator-exclusion dead) + IS_PLAYER||INGAME union.
Make timeout pause slowmo=0.0001 (inching) not a hard freeze + add ANNCE_TIMEOUT/PREPARE + per-second CENTER_TIMEOUT countdown.
Use random() for cointoss instead of the deterministic sim-clock LSB (predictable/biased flip).
Honor sv_vote_master_ids (crypto-fingerprint auto-login) + add the master-vote-call timeout_status guard.
Add the ping/packetloss/jointime/crypto_id columns + sv_status_privacy to 'who', and the framestart/realtime/uptime/localtime readouts to 'time'.
Randomize shuffleteams (FOREACH_CLIENT_RANDOM) + read timelimit_increment/decrement for extend/reducematchtime (currently fixed 60s).
Register the missing admin/debug sv_cmd verbs (radarmap/gettaginfo/trace/stuffto/adminmsg/anticheat/delrec/database/printstats etc.).
Make SelectSpawnPoint read Entity.SpawnPointTarg (target_spawnpoint forced-spawn redirection) before scoring + clear it in PutPlayerInServer (setter live, reader dead).
Add relocate_spawnpoint move-out-of-solid (g_spawnpoints_auto_move_out_of_solid) at link time so embedded spots are nudged out, not dropped.
Add the emergency targetcheck=false re-filter and the anypoint/useallspawns weighted-over-all path before the prio-0 in-solid fallback.
Port the race_spawns requirement + assault/race spawn_evalfunc target chain that biases/vetoes spawn scores (race-checkpoint + assault spawn redirection).
Play the SND_SPAWN audio cue (bit1 of g_spawn_alloweffects) + team-color the spawn burst (currently particle-only, untinted).
Set EF_TELEPORT_BIT | EF_RESTARTANIM_BIT on respawn (teleport sparkle + anim restart) + the pre-match countdown shield/pause extension.
Drive spawnpoint_use/setactive/reset + the some_spawn_has_been_used latch from control-point capture (Onslaught/Assault) — SpawnActive read but never flipped.
Multiply spot.cnt into the spawn weight (mapper cluster weighting; default cnt=1 so stock maps unaffected).
Add the sky/lava/trigger_hurt/nade per-offset rejects to the spawn_near_teammate relocation branch (currently a permissive superset; off by default).
Team-color the idle spawn-point glow (Team_ColorRGB) + read cl_spawn_point_dist_max instead of hardcoded 2000qu cull.
Add the 0.5s think throttle + 1s winner-reveal-before-changelevel delay to the map-vote loop.
Seed player suggestions + an abstain slot + per-candidate mapvote_rng tiebreak into the ballot at build (currently rotation-only).
During the vote, force health=2342 + send SVC_FINALE once + zero impulse each tick to hide the scoreboard.

Add the g_balance_teams_queue join queue (deficit-filling tag-in); WantsJoin exists but is never consulted (default off).
Add g_balance_teams_remove: move the newest joiner on the overfull team to spectators after a 10s countdown nag (default off).

Emit the :team: event-log line + INFO_JOIN_PLAY_TEAM notification on a team change (kill+score-clear core already faithful).
Route minigame impulses (MinigameSessionManager.Impulse) before weapon impulses + add the round-not-started drop/reload/use gate + the cheat-impulse branch.

Make next/prev_bygroup (18/19) cycle weaponorder_byimpulse not the priority-list fallback.
Route cheat impulses 99/140-148 (give-all + clone/speedrun/teleport/r00t) — currently no CheatImpulse dispatch from DispatchImpulse.

units.headline: Antilag the W_SetupShot trueaim + shotorg traces (every weapon, hitscan AND projectile) — currently plain present-position traces, so high-ping aim/launch direction is off.

seams_needed: new:setupshot-antilag (reuse the per-weapon lag-comp bracket on the Arc beam trace)
units.headline: Lag-compensate the Arc beam per-frame damage trace (plain trace now; high-ping Arc fails on strafing targets).

seams_needed: new:setupshot-antilag (reuse the lag-comp bracket on the melee swing trace)
units.headline: Lag-compensate the Shotgun melee secondary swing trace (plain trace now).
Recurse antilag into a manned vehicle's body so high-ping shots at a moving vehicle hit its rewound position (vehicle occupants never rewound).
Temporarily add CORPSE to the shooter's hit-contents mask around the antilag trace so hitscan can hit corpse/gibbed bodies.
Clear the antilag ring on explicit (re)spawn/teleport/vehicle enter-exit instead of the >150u origin-jump heuristic.
Implement g_antilag modes 1 (verified client-side) and 3 (prydon cursor) aim-correction (port treats anything != 2 as no-rewind).
Register + allowlist the 'usetarget' cheat command (Cheats.Command case exists but is unreachable — not Register()ed nor in the client allowlist).
Register + allowlist the 'killtarget' cheat command (same dead-case issue as usetarget).

seams_needed: new:cheat-impulse-routing (DispatchImpulse must route impulse 99 to Cheats.GiveAll)
units.headline: Route cheat impulse 99 (GIVE_ALL) to Cheats.GiveAll (the function exists + is tested but has no live caller).
Add the cheat-refusal bprintf logging (Base logs the refused cheat attempt) + the sv_clones clone-allowance branch.
Add the CLONE_MOVING/STANDING cheat impulses (CopyBody corpse clones) + read sv_clones (no CopyBody primitive in the port).
Add SPEEDRUN_INIT/SPEEDRUN personal-waypoint snapshot+restore cheat (origin/velocity/resources/weapons/timers) for race/CTS.
Add the TELEPORT cheat impulse (info_autoscreenshot path + MoveToRandomMapLocation) — both helpers missing.
Add the R00T cheat impulse (random-enemy RadiusDamage 1000 + rocket-explode effect + impact sound).
Add the teleporttotarget cheat command (cheattriggerteleport + teleport_findtarget + Simple_TeleportPlayer).
Add the pointparticles/trailparticles/make/penalty cheat commands (effect spawners + func_breakable spawn + race penalty).

seams_needed: new:cheat-frame-hook (per-frame CheatFrame hook + Drag carry subsystem + dragbox/dragpoint race editor)
units.headline: Add CheatFrame + Drag (pick up/carry/throw entities, te_lightning1 beam, g_grab_range) + the dragbox/dragpoint race map editor.
Add the info_autoscreenshot spawnfunc (TELEPORT cheat destination) + fix g_max_info_autoscreenshot default (60->3).

units.headline: Build the server->client welcome/cvar-push channel: FixClientCvars, MOTD, clientversion request, _teams_available, ClientInit_misc constants (entirely missing; replicated-cvar table is a physics-only stand-in).

Expand joinAllowed gates: version-mismatch, forced-spectator, playban, g_maxping, g_maxplayers/nJoinAllowed capacity + the CENTER_JOIN_PREVENT* centerprints (only MIN_SPEC_TIME+lockteams enforced now).
Add the join queue/team-selection ordering (queued-team dibs two-pass), the campaign bot-start ReadyRestart trigger, and the join notifications (INFO_JOIN_PLAY / CENTER_JOIN_PLAY_TEAM / ANNCE_BEGIN).
Wire ShowRespawnCountdown: decrement Player.RespawnCountdown (already computed) and play the 10-9-8 CNT_RESPAWN announcer from DeadPlayerThink.
Gate fuel REGEN on the IT_FUEL_REGEN item flag + skip the whole fuel block under IT_UNLIMITED_AMMO (port regenerates fuel with no fuel-regen pickup).

Add sv_maxidle idle-kick / move-to-spectator + the idle countdown bangs + parm_idlesince afk alivetime gate (entirely missing).

seams_needed: new:put-observer-transition (SelectObservePoint placement + SPECTATE_WARNING block; shared with sv-ipban playban)
units.headline: Complete PutObserverInServer: SelectObservePoint placement, despawn EFFECT_SPAWN, vote/ready recount, SPECTATE_WARNING block, RES_ARMOR=g_balance_armor_start.
Add the sv_spectate-disabled spectator kick (SPECTATE_WARNING then INFO_QUIT_KICK_SPECTATING past g_maxplayers_spectator_blocktime).
Apply the (time < game_starttime) countdown extension to spawn shield + armor/health rot + regen pauses (player spawning during pre-match countdown loses protection early).
Add the superweapon pickup/lost/broken centerprints + INFO_SUPERWEAPON_PICKUP + SND_POWEROFF countdown, MF_ROCKET jetpack modelflag, EF_NODEPTHTEST/FULLBRIGHT, powerups_remove_all-on-death.
Play playersound_gasp when a player surfaces after running out of air (DrownPlayer surface branch only resets the air timer).

seams_needed: new:chat-bubble-net (chatbubble.spr / minigame-busy bubble over a typing player)
units.headline: Add UpdateChatBubble (typing/minigame-busy bubble), SetZoomState net stat, and the teamkill/taunt voice-sound timers from a lifecycle PreThink.
Add version-nag INFO notifications, sv_name_maxlength truncation + invisible-name replacement (Player#<id>), and INFO_GODMODE_OFF.
Add SpectatePrev/camera-cycle (impulse 12/16/19/220-229), the IMP_weapon_drop CAMERA_SPECTATOR cycle, minigame impulse handling, the +use clippedspectating toggle, sv_spectate 2 block.
Add Player_DetermineForcedTeam / forced-team-otherwise spectator routing at connect + the version_nagtime arm (team currently pre-assigned via AssignBestTeam only).
Complete ClientDisconnect teardown: portal/hook clear, chatbubble/killindicator/personal-wp delete, vehicle exit, minigame part, ReadyCount/VoteCount-on-leave, RemoveExcessPlayers, sv_hook_lastleave.
Run in-spawn team assignment (bot_forced_team / wants_join / JoinBestTeam) + SUB_UseTargets(spot) spawn-target firing + per-client model (port pre-assigns team at connect only).

seams_observed.desc: notification-send: fire registered-but-silent INFO/CENTER/ANNCE notifications + announcers (countdown, frags-left, join-prevent, superweapon, idle, spectator, team nag, vote announce, COUNTDOWN_STOP) at their event sites.

input-impulse-routing: route currently-unbound player impulses through the dispatcher (minigame moves, +use/impulse-21, cheat impulses, waypoint-sprite impulses, map-vote cast, intermission skip, spectate camera-cycle).
round-handler-tick: wire the dead Common RoundHandler to tick + gate (round-start countdown, campaign bot gating, round-not-started impulse gate).
sound-cue-dispatch: add live callers for registered-but-silent sound cues (SND_SPAWN, playersound_gasp, SND_POWEROFF countdown, r00t rocket impact).
entity-alpha-net / EF effect bits: per-entity effect-bit network field (EF_TELEPORT_BIT/EF_RESTARTANIM_BIT on respawn).
fx-emission-wiring: live callers for registered-but-unemitted effects (rocket-explode, pointparticles/trailparticles).
csqcmodel-anim-fx: player-model animation-decide pipeline the client consumes (torso action overlays).
objective-entity-csqc / control-point state: control-point/objective capture driving spawnpoint active/used state + race/assault spawn target chain.

ENT_CLIENT_MAPVOTE net entity: send ballot/mask/live-tallies/own-vote/winner (and level-shot/TE_CSQC_PICTURE transfer) to clients and route client cast impulses back. Load-bearing for the entire (dead) map-vote and gametype-vote feature on both server and client.

Server->client welcome/cvar-push channel: FixClientCvars/clientstuff stuffcmds, clientversion request, _teams_available, MOTD/SendWelcomeMessage, autoscreenshot trigger, ClientInit_misc per-client init entity (damage/fog/trueaim constants), campaign level number.
Shared team_forced field + connect-time forced-team resolution (g_forced_team_*/otherwise, g_campaign_forceteam, bot_forced_team, TEAM_FORCE_SPECTATOR) consumed by teamplay join + join-allowed gate.
CheatImpulse dispatch branch from the impulse dispatcher (impulses 99/140-148) routing to the cheat subsystem (give-all/clone/speedrun/teleport/r00t).

Route the W_SetupShot trueaim + muzzle-nudge traces (and the Arc beam + shotgun-melee per-frame traces) through the lag-compensation bracket so every weapon aims at rewound enemy positions at g_antilag==2.
Real PutObserverInServer demotion (observe-point placement + recount + spectate-warning) reusable by playban and the spectator-kick paths.
Player_ChangeTeam (veto) + Player_ChangedTeam mutator dispatch wrapping every server-side team set.
Network the wepent charge/clip/heat fields (vortex/oknex charge+pool, clip_load/size, hagar_load, minelayer_mines, arc_heat) to feed the CrosshairPanel HUD rings.
Networked serverflags global (ALLOW_FULLBRIGHT/FORBID_PICKUPTIMER from readlevelcvars) for client-side fullbright/pickup-timer gating.
Shared server->client RNG seed broadcast entity (ENT_CLIENT_RANDOMSEED, rerolled every 5s) for deterministic client-side random effects.
Server->client ping/packet-loss/movement-loss report (round-robin one client per think) feeding the scoreboard ping column + playerstats latency.
Network STAT(OVERTIMES) for the persistent HUD OVERTIME / overtime-count banner.
Broadcast the queued next map to clients (Set_NextMap/Send_NextMap_To_Player) for the scoreboard 'Next map:' line.
Server-authoritative PRESSED_KEYS stat for spectated players (+ observer-clears-PRESSED_KEYS) feeding the strafe/pressedkeys panel.
Real TrueSkill mu/var skill provider so the g_balance_teams_skill weighted-team-balance path stops reducing to a plain count.
Server redirect / mass-reconnect (RedirectionThink + quit_and_redirect end-of-match override + quit_when_empty).

Wire the dead campaign map-entity host handlers (IsCampaign/CampaignLevelWarpHandler/NextLevelHandler + ForceWin setter + ChangeLevel gametype switch) so target_levelwarp/target_changelevel work in a campaign.
Per-weapon wr_aim bot fire driver (secondary fire/charge/detonate/combo per weapon slot) replacing the single-primary-button Emit.
Bot scripting command queue (bot_cmd / scripting.qc) for map/console bot scripts and waypoint-editor driving.
Per-waypoint danger .dmg accumulation (botframe_updatedangerousobjects) feeding the A* route cost so bots route around lava/rocket zones.
General PlayerUseKey routing (impulse 21 + +use edge) + PlayerUseKey mutator hook for doors/objectives/buttons (only the vehicle enter/exit half is wired).
Personal/team waypoint-sprite deploy/clear + HelpMePing (with the CTS/race clear-suicide side effect) for the waypoint-sprite impulses.
Network the animdecide upper/lower-body action state (+times) for remote torso firing/pain/jump overlays.
Network wepent m_switchweapon/m_switchingweapon (remote weapon raise/lower anim) + m_alpha/gunalign/porto/tuba/skin viewmodel fields.
ent_cs public/private field mask: stop sending origin/angles/health/armor to non-teammate enemies unless radar_showenemies/SAME_TEAM.
Degrade a PVS-culled teammate to a coarse origin-only send so the radar GPS blip persists out of view.
CopyBody corpse-clone spawn primitive (needed by the clone cheat impulses).
Per-frame CheatFrame hook + Drag entity-carry subsystem + dragbox/dragpoint race map editor.
Chat-bubble (chatbubble.spr / minigame-busy) network field + render over a typing player.
Network the team-size-difference nag bits (sv_teamnagger) for the client unbalanced-teams warning.

clusters.cluster: client + effect + sound + notification (cl-announcer, cl-centerprint, cl-csqcmodel, cl-crosshair, cl-hud, cl-scoreboard, cl-shownames, cl-teamradar, cl-view, cl-viewmodel, fx-deathtypes, fx-notifications, fx-effectinfo, fx-sounds)

units.headline: Wire dead centerprint title driver (gametype-name title + duel 'A vs B' title) and broadcast COUNTDOWN_ROUNDSTOP; read cl_announcer/_antispam cvars + AnnouncerOption mutator hook.
units.cross_unit_dep: Title rendering is shared with cl-centerprint (SetTitle/SetDuelTitle); ROUNDSTOP depends on RoundHandler (S2) modeling roundstarttime==-1.

units.headline: Route the dead raw engine centerprint() family (door/trigger/target .message, locked-door, item hints, target_print) to the panel; wire SetTitle/SetDuelTitle drivers; carry durcnt per-step duration + correct ROUNDSTART ^COUNT arg; fix fade_in default 0->0.15; implement MSG_CENTER_KILL + Kill/ClearAll callers + chat /tell centerprint feed.
units.cross_unit_dep: durcnt duration + MSG_CENTER_KILL are shared with fx-notifications (center.durcnt / net.kill); title drivers shared with cl-announcer.

units.headline: Network the CSQCMODEL extra-properties contract (colormod for ALL entities, scale, alpha, modelflags, traileffect, v_angle, anim_state/upper/lower_action+time) and port animdecide (8-direction + duck locomotion + upper-body actions); wire MF_* trails + jetpack loop; force-model (cl_forceplayermodels); real _lodN swap.
units.cross_unit_dep: Server must send the new Entity fields first (animdecide/colormod/scale/v_angle); presentation half (LocomotionBlend, ModelTint, CsqcModelEffects) consumes them after. Force-model + LOD swap are self-contained client-side once data exists.

units.headline: Feed the five dead weapon-stat rings (Vortex charge/pool, reload clip, Arc heat, Hagar load, MineCount) + pickup pulse from networked stats; make hit-indication + nade/capture/revive objective rings work on a pure remote client (read networked stats client-side, not host-only); fix teammate-shrink divisor (1.25->crosshair_hittest); populate per-weapon crosshair dict.
units.cross_unit_dep: Needs weapon clip/charge/heat/load + LAST_PICKUP + CAPTURE/REVIVE stats networked to the client (ServerNet) and read back into the panel; today only host-side LocalServerPlayer feeds them.

units.headline: Feed the dead panels: vote state -> VotePanel, intermission mapvote -> MapVotePanel, race lap/checkpoint splits -> RaceTimer/Checkpoints panels; expand ModIcons per-gametype coverage (CTF/Dom/Assault); draw hud_dock; replace flat DrawBar with skin 9-slice progressbar (baralign 0/1/2/3); add hud_dynamic_follow + 5-stop NumColor blink.
units.cross_unit_dep: Vote/mapvote/race-split/modicons all need NEW server->client network feeds (server VoteController/MapVoting/race records exist but client never receives them); progressbar primitive is self-contained client work.

units.headline: Set ScoreboardPanel.Active so the cross-fade runs (not Visible-only pop); feed dead SetSpectators/RespawnRemaining/SetRankings; network ping/pl/fps/skill columns + correct ping bands (20/80/200); add name-cell icons (color/ready/handicap/wants-join); add item-stats block + interactive UI (nav/team-select/spectate/kick/tell/column-cycle) + death/intermission auto-show.
units.cross_unit_dep: Spectator list / respawn / rankings / ping / pl / inventory item-stats all need NEW server->client feeds; the Active-fade fix and interactive UI are otherwise self-contained client work.

units.headline: Apply entcs_GetAlpha model-alpha factor so tags fade with cloaked/fading models; truncate name to box width (textShortenToWidth); add self/spectatee own-tag + 1s spectatee-switch grace; gate sameteam + health/armor on the server private slice rather than client-side colormap.
units.cross_unit_dep: entcs_GetAlpha factor depends on per-entity Alpha networking (S7, shared with cl-csqcmodel); private-slice health/armor gating depends on ServerNet entity-state gating; the name truncation + fade-factor are self-contained client edits.

units.headline: Add maximized fullscreen tactical radar + clickable layer (ONS spawn-select/teleport, input, hover-glow); ping pulse rings (preserve RadarIcon bit-7 in ServerNet, port teamradar_times pulse loop); Onslaught radar links (ENT_CLIENT_RADARLINK); fix luma-vs-code cvar defaults (4096/0.8) + honor hud_panel_radar 0/1/2 gating; fix icon size to fixed 8x8.
units.cross_unit_dep: Ping pulse needs ServerNet to stop masking RadarIcon&0xFF (drops the ping bit); radar links + clickable ONS depend on Onslaught objective entities (S11) being in scope; rotation/default-cvar fixes are self-contained client work.

units.headline: Network + apply view_punchvector (origin recoil kick) — ServerNet/ClientNet/NetGame; wire the dead classic chase_active third-person cam (set CameraMode, read chase_back/up/front/overhead/pitchangle) + spectator third-person (View_SpectatorCamera, CAMERA_SPECTATOR); render HUD_Damage as gfx/blood texture not flat rect; add velocity-zoom + zoom-scroll + zoomscript readers.
units.cross_unit_dep: punchvector needs a NEW networked field (mirrors the existing PunchAngle path); spectator camera needs CAMERA_SPECTATOR stat networked. Damage-texture + zoom-script readers are self-contained client work.

units.headline: Emit dead shell casings (ShellCasings sim complete but EffectSystem.SpawnCasing has zero callers + no server emit) incl. bounce sounds; apply view-model team colormap + per-weapon glowmod + EF_NODEPTHTEST + per-child skin; add muzzle-flash MODEL (Devastator/Machinegun spinning md3); network wframe fire/idle/reload animation; read cl_viewmodel_alpha/_gunalign/_gunoffset/sway cvars instead of baked Exports.
units.cross_unit_dep: Casings need a server-side emit/SpawnCasing caller (S8 fx-emission-wiring); colormap/glowmod on the gun share the CSQCMODEL appearance pipeline (S10); wframe anim needs a NEW network channel. Cvar-read fixes are self-contained client work.

units.headline: Add the missing SelectSpecial branches: NADE family (nade/nade_ice/heal/darkness/napalm -> DEATH_*_NADE, LIVE under g_nades), KILL->DEATH_SELF_SUICIDE, MIRRORDAMAGE->DEATH_SELF_BETRAYAL (both LIVE), TEAMCHANGE/AUTOTEAMCHANGE self lines + death_team f1 arg (LIVE), HURTTRIGGER msg_from_ent + DEATH_CUSTOM; add CTS /kill obituary suppression + BOTLIKE achievement announce.
units.cross_unit_dep: none — notif rows already registered; the defect is purely in the deathtype->message selector + EmitObituary suicide branch.

units.headline: Carry per-notification centerprint durcnt duration on the wire (currently fixed 3s; item_centerprinttime=1.5 ignored); wire GentleMode setter (cl_gentle/sv_gentle) so gentle text is selected; add spectator-follow recipients in NotificationReaches (IS_SPEC/to.enemy clauses); implement Kill_Notification/MSG_CENTER_KILL server->client group-clear; fix CvarBool fallback polarities (location/specialonly) + item_wepammo name.
units.cross_unit_dep: Duration wire + MSG_CENTER_KILL are the same gaps tracked in cl-centerprint (center.durcnt / kill.all_remote); coordinate so the wire change lands once. ShouldSend + gentle + cvar fixes are self-contained server-side.

units.headline: Fix stain baseline defaults: stainsize {1,1}->{2,2} (22 of 30 staintex blocks rely on the baseline -> half-size splats) and staincolor default+semantics (0xFFFFFF absolute -> 0xFFFFFFFF modding factor); implement `stainless` keyword as stain-disable (staintex[0]=-2) not a no-op.

Fix the broken player/voice body-sound path: parse the .sounds manifest (key->file, e.g. pain50 -> sound/player/espeak/player/pain50) instead of treating sound/player/default.sounds as a directory — currently ALL pain/death/drown/taunt/team-radio are silent; fix hitsound sample misc/hitconfirm->misc/hit; add GlobalSound_pitch model-scale shift, sound_allowed owner-walk/bot_sound_monopoly, play2/play2team/spamsound, per-recipient cl_voice_directional/cl_autotaunt.
units.cross_unit_dep: none for the core manifest/hitsound fix — the registered sound cues already exist; this is the dispatch/path-resolution side of S3 (sound-cue-dispatch) but edits stay within this unit's files.

seams_observed.desc: notification-send: fire registered-but-never-fired notifications at event sites; here specifically the dead centerprint TITLE drivers (gametype/duel), ROUNDSTOP, and centerprint duration/kill plumbing.
round-handler-tick: needed so roundstarttime==-1 (Round-cannot-start) state exists to broadcast COUNTDOWN_ROUNDSTOP.
entity-alpha-net: per-entity Alpha network field so cloaked/fading models fade their nameplate tag (entcs_GetAlpha) and the CSQCMODEL alpha property reaches the client.
fx-emission-wiring: live server/client callers for registered-but-unemitted effects — shell casings (SpawnCasing has zero callers) and MF-driven trails.

csqcmodel-anim-fx: the player-model animation-decide + effect-flag/forced-color/glow pipeline; both the third-person model (animdecide, colormod, glowmod) and the view-model (team colormap, glowmod) consume it.
mod-icons-hud: gametype status block -> mod-icon HUD feed; CTF flag-state / Dom point / Assault icons currently only partially covered.
objective-entity-csqc: networked Onslaught objective entities — prerequisite for ONS radar links and clickable spawn-point select on the maximized radar.
sound-cue-dispatch: add live callers / correct sample resolution for registered-but-silent sound cues; here the broken PlayerSound manifest path and the hitsound sample.

Network the full CSQCMODEL_EXTRAPROPERTIES set on Entity (colormod for ALL entities, scale, alpha, modelflags, traileffect, v_angle, anim_state/upper/lower_action+time). Spine of cl-csqcmodel; feeds cl-shownames/cl-viewmodel tinting too.

Carry per-notification centerprint durcnt duration through Notification -> NotificationDispatch -> WriteNotification/ClientNet so centerprints show for their declared time instead of a fixed 3s. Shared by cl-centerprint + fx-notifications.

Server->client MSG_CENTER_KILL / Kill_Notification message to clear a centerprint cpid group mid-flight (campcheck/idle/find-ammo/timeout); the port only has local replace-by-id. Shared by cl-centerprint + fx-notifications.

Network weapon/objective stats (clip charge/pool, reload, arc heat, hagar load, mine count, LAST_PICKUP, CAPTURE/REVIVE progress, hit damage total) to a pure remote client and read them back into the crosshair/objective-ring panels (today host-only via LocalServerPlayer).

A family of missing server->client display feeds that drive dead client panels: vote state, intermission mapvote grid, race lap/checkpoint splits, scoreboard ping/pl/fps/skill + spectators + respawn + rankings + inventory item-stats. Each panel renders correctly when given data but is never fed.
Network view_punchvector (origin recoil kick) mirroring the existing PunchAngle path, then add it to the rendered view origin.
Spectator/classic third-person camera: set FirstPersonView.CameraMode + read chase_* knobs + network CAMERA_SPECTATOR stat (View_SpectatorCamera).
Network the weapon wframe (fire1/fire2/idle/reload) animation state so the view-model visibly cycles/reloads with server timing.
Preserve the RadarIcon ping bit (ServerNet masks it with &0xFF) for radar ping pulses, and add ENT_CLIENT_RADARLINK networking for Onslaught control-point connection lines.
Replace the flat 3-rect DrawBar with the skin progressbar 9-slice primitive honoring baralign 0/1/2/3 (esp. center-bidirectional accel bar); shared by every bar-drawing HUD panel.

seam_rollup.desc: notification-send: send registered-but-never-fired INFO/CENTER/ANNCE notifications at their event sites (round-win/tied/over, capture, role, frags-remaining, finish/record, alone, supermonster). Pervasive across every gametype — the single most common gap.

sound-cue-dispatch: add live callers for registered-but-silent SoundSystem cues (KH alarm siren / capture jingle / collect / drop, DOM_CLAIM, nexball bounce/drop/shoot/steal, ONS build/under-attack/explode, KA pickup/drop/touch).
fx-emission-wiring: live callers/parameters for registered-but-unemitted effects (KeyHunt capture VFX te_lightning2/plasma chain, Onslaught EFFECT_CAP/RAGE/SPARKS/explosion).

active-mutators-mech: BuildMutatorsString/PrettyString + MUT_* active-mutator HUD/scoreboard/server-browser advertisement. The single most pervasive shared gap — the whole mechanism is unported and nearly every mutator has a dead per-mutator string handler or none at all.

input-impulse-routing: route currently-unbound player input/impulses — CTF flag throw/pass/request-pass, KeyHunt voluntary +use key drop, Keepaway/TeamKeepaway/Nexball ball drop/pass. The handlers are ported and unit-tested but have no input binding.

round-handler-tick: wire the live RoundHandler to tick per-gametype callbacks (CanRoundStart/End, CheckWinner, warmup/countdown, round timelimit/stalemate). Many gametypes call EnableRounds() with no callbacks so the handler uses degenerate CA defaults; several also build a SECOND Common RoundHandler whose Tick is never called.

projectile-net-model: networked flying-projectile entity with model+trail (NetEntityKind.Projectile defined but assigned nowhere). CTF flag toss velocity + dropped-flag tumble depends on a thrown-object visual; only marginally needed for gametypes.

Multiple defined-but-never-Called hook chains (SetWeaponArena, ForbidRandomStartWeapons, SetDefaultAlpha) plus entirely-missing chains (MonsterDropItem, MakePlayerObserver, ClientDisconnect, reset_map_global, PutClientInServer, SpectateCopy, AddedPlayerScore post-write, VehicleEnter, DropSpecialItems, ClientConnect, CopyBody, Item_RespawnCountdown/ScheduleRespawn, Item_Spawn, MonsterMove, SV_ParseClientCommand). Cross-cutting lifecycle/cleanup infrastructure.

The single biggest cross-cutting defect: TurretAI.Damage and VehicleCommon.DamageVehicle (and vehicles_heal) are faithfully written but have NO live caller. DamageSystem.EventDamage routes non-player targets through targ.GtEventDamage, but no turret or vehicle ever assigns it, so all turret/vehicle hits fall through to PlayerDamage (player ARMOR/HEALTH split, no per-unit damagerate, no inactive-immunity, no friendly-fire gate, no headshake/retaliate, no shield-then-health split, no death-eject/respawn). Wire the event_damage/event_heal handler at spawn/enter for every turret and vehicle.

Per-unit balance is hardcoded C# const instead of cvar-loaded (load_unit_settings / TR_PROPS_COMMON / g_turrets_unit_<name>_* / turret_scale_* / g_turrets_reloadcvars). Baked values mostly match cfg but several drift (biases default to 1.0, track accel/blend defaults, respawntimes, shot_spread, range_optimal), server overrides + map scale multipliers are inert, and value drift goes uncaught. A shared cvar-backed param table fixes the whole bias/track/respawn/spread/range class across all turrets.

No turret networking (TNSF_* send/parse, ENT_CLIENT_TURRET) and no cl_turrets.qc client presentation: head sub-entity/model + rotation/spin, team recolor, low-HP sparks/smoke, death rocket-explode + gib toss, waypoint sprite/healthbar, per-unit head-frame animations, the tesla idle crackle arc, walker ground-align, ewheel rolling draw.
Per-weapon bot wr_aim hooks (projectile lead, primary/secondary distance switching, detonation decisions) — deferred for all weapons in BotBrain; needed for bot weapon competence.

mod-icons-hud: gametype status block -> mod-icon HUD feed + client mode-select. Server send Kind + client ModIconsMode case both missing for CTF flag status, Domination pps, Keepaway/TeamKeepaway carrying, Nexball carrying, LMS leader.
